programmes.show_description: Icelandic band Of Monsters and Men take over the Indie Forever playlist!
Following their appearance at the 6 Music festival another chance to hear The Horrors recorded live at Glastonbury in 2009 and in session for 6 Music.
Following their appearance at the 6 Music Festival another chance to hear Bloc Party recorded live at the Fez Club, Reading & Somerset House, London.
3/4. 6 Music Festival 2026 headliner Courtney Barnett shares her songwriting inspirations.
Want to hear the latest tracks 6 Music have added to their playlist? Then listen here!
Chris with the early morning breakfast show and it's the start of the 6 Music Festival!
Nick looks forward to 6 Music Festival 2026, which kicks off later today.
Lauren gets your Wednesday going with the most magnificent music.
The 6 Music Festival starts TODAY! Whether you're heading to Manchester or listening from home, Craig is here to help get you in the mood.
Huw is live from Band on the Wall, and will be chatting to TTSSFU, Pyncher and Ellen Beth Abdi in the lead-up to BBC Introducing live at 6 Music Festival in Manchester.
Nathan and Deb are live from Band on the Wall in Manchester for the 6 Music Festival, with live sets from Ellen Beth Abdi and pyncher.
Live from the 6 Music Festival.
Nathan Shepherd and Deb Grant are live from Band on the Wall, Manchester for the 6 Music Festival!
Live from the 6 Music Festival.
Emily is live from Band on the Wall, Manchester, for the 6 Music Festival! She'll be joined by pyncher, fresh from their live performance.
Live from the 6 Music Festival.
Ryan and Chris come together (with their matching Prince tattoos) for an hour of celebration of the great Paisley Park.
Mancunian experimental rock band Legs on Wheels take you out on midnight run with a Running playlist. (Legs, running, get it?).
The Bloc Party frontman reveals the records that are part of his musical DNA, talks through the band's debut album, his solo material & what to expect from the new LP.
Kele Okereke shares the pivotal moments that have made him the artist he is today, and the songs that have sound-tracked the ups and downs of his life.
For the final episode, Jay switched things up a lil and jumped on the decks for an hour in the mix.
Soundtrack the early hours with back-to-back music, plus exclusive BBC sessions.
Chris with the early morning breakfast show, plus highlights from the 6Music Festival!
Wesley Joseph chats to Nick ahead of his set at the 6 Music Festival this evening, and Nick catches up with TTSSFU after her performance for BBC Introducing last night.
SILVERWINGKILLER chat to Lauren ahead of their set at the 6 Music Festival.
Ahead of their 6 Music Festival appearance this evening, Craig chats to English-French noise rock band Mandy, Indiana.
Celebrating the gigs at this year's 6 Music Festival and beyond, and Huw goes record shopping with Luke Una.
Reviewing this week's new releases.
Nathan and Deb are live from Band on the Wall in Manchester for the 6 Music Festival, with live sets from Wesley Joseph and SILVERWINGKILLER.
